name: Gloria Vanderbilt
description: American businesswoman, fashion designer, socialite and writer (1924-2019)
abstract: Gloria Laura Vanderbilt (February 20, 1924 – June 17, 2019) was an American artist, author, actress, fashion designer, heiress, and socialite. In 1934, she was the subject of a high-profile child custody trial in which her mother Gloria Morgan Vanderbilt, and her paternal aunt, Gertrude Vanderbilt Whitney, each sought custody of her and …

about_quotes.speaker: Mary Lou Williams
about_quotes.evidence: I know they must have spent a fortune doing it, had a party and Gloria Vanderbilt, her husband, and the Hallmark people were sponsoring the Charlie Parker Foundation.
